string 2: What a strange creature! Ya aren't a Digimon, are ya?

But if ya aren't a Digimon, then what are ya?
Hmm... I dunno, but I guess it doesn't really matter!
Humans, here...? Where'd you wander in from?!

...Wait. Maybe you're a new species of Digimon. Well, you
seem harmless enough, so make yourselves at home.

I've heard talk of you. They say you had a hand in solving
the trouble at the Central Tower.

Thank you for helping this town, despite having only
just arrived!

Seems you got Locomon back up and running. Now you can visit
a lot more places!

Rumors are going around that there are lots of Titans
showing up around these parts. Is that true?

Lord Merukimon must have some kind of plan to stop them, right?
I sure hope he does something soon...

All I wanna do is eat a packed lunch and enjoy the scenery
while riding Locomon. Sure hope they get running again soon!

Well! An unfamiliar face. You have quite a unique
appearance... Are you a new arrival, perhaps?

If so, you ought to pay a visit to the station square. The
view of the Central Tower from there is spectacular.

Simply go straight to reach the station square. All visitors
to Central Town owe it to themselves to see the tower.

Hey, there. Haven't seen ya around these parts before. I'm
guessing you're a newcomer... First time in town?

Uh-oh. You're feelin' a little bit lost, huh? Ya can't fool me.
It's written all over yer face! All right. Lay it on me!

Well, well. Ya know Minervamon? Ya sure do got friends in
high places! Bet you wanna know where Minervamon is, huh?

Okay, okay! The info is yers for 100,000 YEN! So how about it?
We got a deal?!
It's a deal!
No deal.

Ooh, so assertive! Hehehe! I like ya! Okay, this one's on
the house!

Hold on, now! I was just joking! I'll give ya a freebie
this time! Okay?

Okay... So if ya wanna know where Minervamon is, yer best
bet is Merukimon. You're sure to get yer answers there!

Merukimon's the head honcho of this town! You should find
him hanging out in the tavern down through that alley!
Go check out the tavern in the alley! Merukimon should be there!

Yo! What's up, prospective patron? Welcome to the best shop
in Central Town!

Hey, check out my Gawappa gear! No bad deals here, and
that's a fact! ♪ Your buddy Gawappamon's got your back! ♪

Would you shut up already... God, can't you stay quiet
for five minutes...?
Yo, my guy! That ain't it! That ain't gonna help with nothin'!

You gotta shout it out loud and proud! That's why you ain't
sellin' jack!
Hmph... Who asked you...

You might not be able to return here once you go to the 
Guardian Palace, Junomon's temple. Are you ready?
We're ready!
We need a little more time.
Okay. Then, off we go!

Sure. If anything's still weighing on your mind, now's the
time to go take care of it.
Hello, there! This is the Locomon Railroad.
Ready to board...?
Yes, please!
Not right now.{end}
Then, hang tight for a bit until Locomon arrives.
What?! You don't want to...?

Yay! Locomon's here! Now I can eat a packed lunch while
watching the scenery whoosh by, just like I wanted!

Aha! So Locomon is operating again. That will certainly
make traveling to other areas easier, won't it.

It's been a while since I left town, myself. Perhaps I'll
take a trip. Now, where to go...?

It's finally time to say goodbye to this town! I gotta go to
other places to show off the special training I got here.
I don't recognize you... Who are you? Where are you from?
But whatever... The Digimeat here is yummy. You should get some.
Hey! They say Blimpmon is back! Now we can go all kinds of places!

Hey! Are you eating right? If you're gonna be traveling
around, you gotta eat!
Haven't seen you around here... Who are you?

"Humans"? Doesn't ring a bell... Anyway, I'm tryin' to
figure out what to buy, so see you later.

Blimpmon's back! It's been a while, so maybe I'll go check
out the Factorial Area...

I get hurt a lot when I go places, so I'm makin' sure to
stock up here.

If humans get hurt a lot, too, then you should buy some
medicine, just in case.

In addition to the Central Tower, you even helped us fix the
Locomon Railroad. You all have been of great service.

You can go to the Guardian Palace once the Locomon Railroad
is working. I pray you make it back to your world safely.

I imagine Junomon may have unique insights on how to
deal with you as well.

Anyway, let's head to the Guardian Palace, where Junomon's
temple is located.
Wow, Locomon! It's so cool!
Hey, take me with you! I want to ride Locomon!

You were able to fix Locomon! That means we can finally go
to Junomon's temple.
Now, let's follow Minerva!
Are you the ones that fixed Locomon?!

Grrr! You guys keep hoggin' all the glory! I'll be strong,
too, before ya know it, so watch out!
Look, Big Bro! It's Locomon! They're sooo cool!
I wanna go somewhere with ya aboard Locomon one day!

Ya might be in for some heavy fighting in the Factorial Area!
Are ya sure you're ready?
{next}We're ready.
We need a little more time.{end}
All right! Off we go, then!
Fine. I'll be waiting!
Hey! You, there!

Whoa. I wouldn't get too close. Best keep your distance if
you're going to have a look.

I feel like eating meat made my jaw stronger! Now it's time
to test out my theory!
One, two, one, two...! Urgh. I gotta get... stronger!
Who'd ever call that jerk... *panting*... a "teacher"...?!
Just you wait...! Next time... it'll be me... who wins!
You won't outdo me...!
Want a ride?
Yes.
{end}No.
Go to the forest?
Let's start by gathering information in the area.

Never seen ya around before! Ya here to check out my
passionate shout, too?!

Yeah, of course ya are! No one can resist my soulful screams!
Well, all right. Listen all ya want!
HEY! YOU GUYS! Don't you dare IGNORE MY SHOUTS!

Oh! You folks must be new here.
Did you come from the outside world?

The Titans are causing a lot of trouble out there, right?
But we have Merukimon here, so I'm not worried.
Locomon is undergoing maintenance.

Minervamon? Haven't seen Minervamon around here. Why not
check the alley back there?
Huh? You need something?

Guess what? Blimpmon can take you places where there aren't
any Locomon stations! They carry lots of stuff every day!

Guess what? Blimpmon can take you places where there aren't
any Locomon stations! Except they're on a break now. Try later!

I craft farm goods. I can use materials to make items, or I can
disassemble them.
Could you make an item for me?
Could you disassemble an item for me?
I guess I don't need anything.
Anything else?
Come back when you get some more materials.

I hear the Titans are causing lots of trouble everywhere.
I hope they don't come to this town...

Don't worry! It'll be fine. If they come here, Merukimon
will sort them out!
What's up, yo? If you're new in town, step right up!

I got the good stuff for sale in my stash! ♪ So make sure,
everybody, to spend some cash! ♪

Don't be strangers, my friends, you hear? ♪ Stop on by
whenever near! ♪
Haven't seen you around here... Who are you?

"Humans"? Doesn't ring a bell... Anyway, I'm tryin' to
figure out what to buy, so see you later.

Blimpmon's back! It's been a while, so maybe I'll go check
out the Factorial Area...
I don't recognize you... Who are you? Where are you from?
But whatever... The Digimeat here is yummy. You should get some.
Hey! They say Blimpmon is back! Now we can go all kinds of places!

That Central Tower allows us to communicate with other places,
but it's also one of this town's most famous landmarks.

The view of the Central Tower from here is great, but I bet
the view from the tower itself is also very nice.

But the footing's kind of dangerous, since it's all steel frame,
so getting to see that view may be tricky! Hahaha!

There's a strange cloud obscuring the Central Tower. What in
the world is going on?

With that strange Central Tower cloud gone, communication has
apparently returned, so we can breathe easy again for now.

That reminds me. It seems Blimpmon is back in the square.
Go have a look, if you're interested.

If so, you ought to pay a visit to the station square. The
view of the Central Tower from there is spectacular.
Indeed... We must be vigilant about not letting our defenses falter.

Word is that the Titans have drawn near... Where in the world
did they come from?

An oversight on our part, to be sure, but Lord Merukimon
has no excuse!

I dunno who you guys are, but I'm in the middle of training!
Don't bother me!
C'mon. Stop messing around! We're usually about evenly matched!

Hey, you people don't look familiar! If you're having any
trouble, you oughta go talk to Merukimon!
Central Town is safe as can be! And it's all thanks to Merukimon!
...Wait! Who are you?! Stay away! Don't eat me!

Training with you won't get me anywhere! Lemme fight
someone stronger!

I finally got permission... All right! Now I can fight
someone strong!

Bein' able to make ends meet without worryin' is nice and all,
but I get bored when things are too easy...
Sure wish somethin' would come along and gimme a jolt of excitement.
So ya took down the Titans...? Yeah, I guess that's pretty impressive...

I heard Blimpmon's here. As dull as it is around this place,
maybe I'll leave town for a bit.
Except I haven't decided where to go... Hmm, where would be good...?

All right, you grunts! Get out there again today and do Lord
Plutomon proud!
Say no more, boss!
Yeah, let's do this!
Don't ya worry!
Hey! ToyAgumon runts! You're with us, right?!
Oh, uh... yes! That's right! Let's do this thing!
Hahaha...
Hurry up and get this work done! Otherwise, I can't go drinking!
Gah, they work as slow as slugs... So annoying...
Hey! You're doing it wrong!

Your horns, Tuskmon! Use your horns! And you, there! Use those
vaunted fists of yours!

Oh, for the love of... Snap to it or you'll never beat those
back-alley brutes!
Make the most of your strengths!
Huh? Locomon? Never heard of a Digimon by that name.
You oughta be more worried about getting back to your post.

This town has taken a turn for the worse since the Titans
took over...
Some of the townsfolk are trying to adapt to the new status quo...
...but their standard of living is pretty hard for us to bear.
Where could Lord Merukimon have gone...?
Hey! Hold on, you! That's way too expensive! What're you thinking?!

Since the Titans got here, everybody's grumblin' and runnin'
around like crazy with work...
But if ya do good, ya get recognized and rewarded for it.

Maybe this actually ain't so bad compared to how wild things
were before?

I was worried for a while, but now that I'm able to
ride the rails again, I'm happy as can be!

Now I can get back to taking passengers around to
all kinds of different places!
I'm truly grateful!

Please see the station attendant if there's somewhere you'd
like to go!
I'll gladly take you there!
*sigh* Everywhere I turn, the work is so dull...

Is there no job to be had that's more glamorous, more
high-paying? Hm, my sweet bee?
"S-Sweet bee"?!
Let's see... Glamorous and high-paying...?
Hmm... I'm afraid I don't know any jobs like that...

Tsk! Then you're of no use to me...! *sigh* When will this
tedium end...?

Get this! There's this one boss at work who's always on my
case to speed it up!

So one day I just cracked 'em good without even thinkin'
about it! Gahaha!
Really?! Then what happened?
Eh? I was so mad, I quit!
Gahaha!
You did?! That's awesome! Gyahaha!
Ya sure are tossin' out lotsa trash there, bro.
Hey, don't sweat it! Those Raremon will clean it all up!
If anything, they should thank me for giving them work!

I get to take it easy and they get work. It's win-win for
all of us! Nothing beats that, am I right?
Oh, I get it! Wow, bro! You're so smart!
Hey, there! You're...
...Wait. Who were you, again? ...But whatever. No biggie.

What matters is, I got some juicy info for you, so clean out
your ears!
There's a new LadyDevimon who just got hired at the tavern!

But this isn't your average, run-of-the-mill LadyDevimon.
This one's WAY more foxy!

The Lillymon there before was all right, but she couldn't
hold a candle to this LadyDevimon!
Go get an eyeful for yourself! You won't be sorry you did!

While it does feel like life is more rich here since the
Titans arrived...

...it has also lost it's rhythm. The town no longer has
any buffer, and there's more thugs around. It's awful.

The benefits of meal vouchers make me want to
stick it out, but...
...we really need to come up with a more effective solution.
You look like you're doin' pretty good for yourself...
Hey, you got anything to spare?

C'mon, it doesn't gotta be much! A bigshot like you must
have somethin' right? Right?!

Come now, you lot! We have another day to while away with
drink and merrymaking!
What's that you say? Refuse disposal?
Leave such trifles to the Raremon!
They work overtime without complaint, so no need to worry!

Most convenient for us, I have to say! But, one has to use
their head to get anywhere in this world!
Bwahahahaha!
Test

Hold it right there, you! Things are finally cheap again, so
now I wanna buy something!

Oh, my! You were a sight to see in battle! Thank you so
much for all your help!

So... even though it turned out the Titans aren't entirely
evil...

...I'm still glad the town has returned to the way it used
to be. It's a big relief!

We finally took back the city! Maybe this is a good chance
to start things over.

We took it back, but perhaps we should train so we don't
repeat the same mistakes.
Seems a solution was found to the issues taken up on the agenda.

Now we simply need to complete the assigned tasks in order
of priority.

Shrinkage did progress in the previous battle, but I hope we
can get on with what needs to be done without excuses.

But, the Titans showed a good deal of value. I'd like to
commit there, after some screening.
The Titans left! Now there's nothing to be afraid of!

I just gotta have faith in my strength, and get out there
and go for it!

This place is nice and calm, just like where I'm from. Maybe
I'll make this my new home.

Somebody sure came back buff and brawny. I should spare
myself the embarrassment and get into shape, too.

Locomon... is not here. I suppose that means we're closed
for the time being.
So Locomon is doing well in the human world.

We won't be able to reopen the railroad, but I'm glad to
hear it is safe and sound.

But, that being the case, maybe I'll close up and take some
time off.

How could you abandon our master in a moment of need?! Have
you no shame?!
Aw, pipe down. We saved the city, did we not?

Gotta say, that guy was pretty strong, though. I'd love to
go another round with 'em.

What?! Of all the... You could try to at least show a
little remorse!
Hey, everyone! I'm back! And I saw all kinds of cool stuff!

Like a place where the houses are trees! A factory full of
machines! A colorful arena! The human world!
Interesting guys and tough guys! And friends I can count on!
Let's go see it all together! It'll be fun!
Yo! I saw what you did, you hero! Not bad!

You've even climbed the ladder in the arena, so you must be
the real deal! I gotta step up my game!
Hello, there, Great Guardian. Marvelous work out there.

It was quite some time ago, but I remember you also solved
our troubles with the Central Tower and Locomon not arriving.

It's been so long since then, but I see you're just as 
powerful as ever. How wonderful.
Omigosh, Paildramon is awesome! He was SO cool back there!

He's normally so innocent, but then when it's go-time, out
comes the steel! *sigh* He makes me want to melt!
We finally made it back! Whew... But, you know...

When I met you long ago, I didn't think I'd end up owing
you so much. You never know what happens in life, right?
Grr! Some of them got away! Dammit!
Get ahold of yourself! We took the town back; isn't that enough?

Don't be naive! That's just a bonus! We have to take out
every last one of these jerks or they'll be back!!!
O-Okay, okay! Now just calm down!

Ah, reinforcements! You have our thanks! Now please,
lend us your strength!
All right! Now we can go in! Move out, everyone!
This way's swamped with Titans! Find another way forward!
Central Town belongs to us! Let's take it back!

Man, who'd a thunk I'd find such a looker in the middle of
all this fightin'!
I think her name was Lilamon... Woowee, talk about hot! Yowza!
That reminds me, didn't Lillymon come back, too?
Ahh, it doesn't get any better than this!
Sheesh... You're like a broken record!
Tah!
Good! On to the next!
Time to go downtown!
Yay! The way is clear! Go, go, go!
Take back the square!

We'll take care of things here! You just hurry on to
Lord Merukimon!
H, heeeeelp!
Noooo!!!
Hey, you! Over here!
Use this ladder. Go around from above!

We'll take care of things here! You just hurry on to
Lord Merukimon!
*tremble*
I'm scared... So scared...
WOW! You're so strong!
Oh, you saved me...! Thanks for getting rid of that brute!
Everyone's in there... doing their best to help!
Clear the way forward!
Dang, it's no good! Can't somebody smash this?!
*sigh* I can't keep training like this day after day...

Starts subquest "The Blacksmith's Request". Shop to be
unlocked upon clearing quest (temporary fix: after dialogue).

That's awesome that MasterBlimpmon acknowledges you. But
they usually don't listen to what others have to say.

We're cleaning this street at the moment, so you'll have to
wait to pass through.
Hey! Ya can't just smash my house!
It's locked.
{next}What is this place...?
{next}Where's Chronomon...?
{next}Aegiomon and the others aren't here, either...

I guess I'll just have to look around and see what's going
on.

Everything's so gloomy these days...
What say we lighten things up with a card battle?
[Challenge to a card battle.]
{end}Now is not the time.
Okay... Come see me if you change your mind.

I lost, but I still had a good time!
Thanks for playing with me!

Well, looks like I won. But, really, just playing is fun
enough for me.

Just a second ago, this self-important big shot came through
here asking if I'd seen any humans...!

But I've never even seen a human before, so it's not like
I'd know!

Wait a minute... You folks don't look like any Digimon I've
ever seen. Could you be...?

Uh-oh. Ya didn't find him? Well, Minervamon's house is right
over there.

One of my pals is always there by himself, but who knows,
Minervamon might actually be home. Go have a look.

Hehehe. I've heard about you. Seems you're doing some
pretty good work out there.
Not sure what you're here for, but good luck and all that.

Hehehe. If it isn't everyone's favorite rookie. I heard
you've been up to more heroics.

With that kind of ability, you might be able to handle
other areas as well... Just don't let your guard down.

You really helped us out! I don't know what we would've done
without you!

I just hope Coronamon doesn't get in trouble again... This
dummy tries too hard to be like Merukimon and Minnie.
Say, did you know that Merukimon used to be a wanderer long ago?

But Merukimon has decided to settle down here now—luckily
for us, Merukimon being so strong and reliable and all.

Lots of folks here look up to Merukimon, and lots of them
want to be warriors, too!

That was a close scrape back there, but that makes me a
warrior now too, right? Right?!

Okay! Now all I have to do is keep getting stronger and
then I'll be just like Merukimon!

Hey, you're those guys from before! Don't go thinkin'
you're hot stuff just 'cause ya took out a few Titans!

And that Coronamon is actin' all high and mighty too, just
'cause he got a little stronger...!

Well, listen up! Ya just got lucky this time! Before ya
know it, I'm gonna be the strongest of all!

Those stupid Titans! One of these days, I'm gonna be tough
enough to swat 'em down like flies!

I know my Big Bro can do it! And I'm gonna get a lot
stronger, too!

Oh, I've been given word about you! I'll take you to the
section that leads to the Central Tower.
{next}All right. Thank you.
Not right now.{end}
Now, then. Hold on tight!
I'll take you to the section that leads to the Central Tower.

Ruffians abound at your destination, so I do hope you're
prepared for a little danger. Are you ready?
{next}Yes, let's go to the Central Tower.
We still need to prepare.{end}
Now, then. Hold on tight!
Simply let me know whenever you wish to go to the Central Tower.
Ah, another peaceful day... Hm?

You don't seem to be a Digimon, so what are you? Wait...
Could you be a human? Which is it?
You're... that human from before...

I hear you're the one who solved that trouble with the
Titans, and our Central Tower problem, too.

Driving off Titans is no easy feat, though... Humans must
be pretty tough creatures.

Have you been to the Factorial Area? It's been a while since
I had some fresh oil, so maybe I'll pay it a visit, too.
The Titans reached our doorstep while we were none the wiser.

It appears they have been stopped for the moment, but
that they would invade at all comes as a surprise.

I'm concerned for the safety of you as a human, and this
town as a whole...

Who are you? Outsiders? This is no place for strangers to
be wandering around!
It's dangerous here, so you can't go inside!

I've been seeing these designs scribbled all over town...
I kinda like it!
These drawings are all over town... Wonder who made them.
They aren't very good...
Do these designs even look nice...? I'm not so sure...

Guess I should be more worried about the Titans, though.
This might not be a good place to be...

Don't bother me! I'm still fuming over losing to the
Titans!
The Titans are here?

ARGH! I don't want to hear a word about Titans! Go bother
someone else!

Nothin' beats back alleys! All right! Time for another day
of diggin' for treasure in the trash!
What? Minervamon? Ehh, She's probably over with Merukimon.

Hey! I dunno who you are, but this is my seat! You can't
have it!
Not many other Digimon come here, so it's nice and peaceful.
Whew... Time for a breather!

Hey, I'm positive that jerk just left without paying. Let's
go lay down the law!
We DID let those Titans get away before, after all...

Don't go gettin' all trigger-happy! Ya forgettin' how we
blasted that poor citizen we mistook for a Titan?!

The neighborhood watch can't go makin' bad calls! So hold
yer horses! Yep, just take it nice and easy...

Looks like somebody else took out some Titans. Let's go
blast some, too!
We're going to miss our chance again...!

No, not yet! Don't jump the gun! The neighborhood watch
needs to stay as cool as cucumbers and think carefully!

It's still too early to make a judgment call! That's what I
think, anyway...

All the soldiers who'll be fighting alongside Lord Merukimon
are gathering in the tavern.
Hehe. I'd say peace will be kept in this city forever!

It seems we have you to thank for subduing those Titans
that appeared nearby.

A new warrior is born! I'm sure Lord Merukimon will be
pleased, too.

Well, well! I heard you not only drove off the Titans, but
also solved the trouble at the Central Tower, too!

And, as if that weren't enough, they say you fought alongside
Lord Merukimon! Oh, how I envy you!
I heard the big news, my friend! A new warrior is born!

However, news of the Titans' appearance so close by has the
townsfolk feeling uneasy...
It's still unclear what action Lord Merukimon will take...
But as warriors of this town, we must see to bolstering its defenses.
No, no, no! That's so inefficient! The way I do it is much better!
Interesting... So that's how you do it. I never considered that...

Sheez, if you can't figure that much out on your own,
you're hopeless!

No work, no food! Only those that do their share get to
eat!
Make sure you remember that! Right? Right?!
Of course, glurp! It's exactly as you say, glurp!
And just who're you...? A newcomer?
You look... weak. You'll never survive here, so leave. Now.
What is with the graffiti all over town?! It's such an eyesore!
I've been wondering that myself. What should we do?
Whaddaya mean, "What should we do?"?! Get rid of it, that's what!

Not to mention the town's filthy with trash and Raremon!
Makes me wanna just level the whole place!
Wide swings like that never hit. Useless in a real fight.

You don't have a feel for these things. That's why you
lose, you know.

Please gather round, everyone...! Today we'll be cleaning
the underground waterway.
Once you're ready, please proceed below!
I had thought the Titans to be terrifying...
Some exploit the labor of Digimon.

They hire them under unfair conditions and make them work
in poor environments.
...Tell me what we're doing now. You go first.
Me?! Um, we're...cleaning up garbage?
You dummy...! That's what the Raremon do!

Numbskulls... How will you get anything done if you can't
even agree on what you're doing?!

That does it! You're gonna repeat the right answer until
you're all on the same page!
We're sorry!!!
I get what it means! But it still makes me mad! AAAAGH!
AAAAAAGH!!!
Hmm... I kinda like this graffiti.
But everyone else seems to think it sucks. What a waste.
Hahaha. I just piled more work on these chumps here.
Just make a few threats and they'll get right on it!
What a good bunch! Hahaha! Now, c'mon! Drink up!
Disgusting...
[Picked up the trash.]
What have we here? Another of my admirers, perhaps?

I'm terribly sorry, but I need a moment to myself. Do know
that your burning admiration is duly received, however.

Though I have not done much of late, I appreciate your
support all the same, my dear!
Wait, you don't know who I am?

Heh... An amusing jest. As if there is a soul who does not
know me, the most popular Digimon in town!

You... are joking, yes? No? Perhaps I have been too much of
a recluse...
Hey, did ya hear?! The Titans are here, and they're close!
What?! But I thought this place had security!
What if... they're already here in town?!
Oh no...! Is it time to run for the hills?!
They say there are Titans nearby!

Really?! Between all the big shots and humans, this place is
a madhouse!
Wh-Who are those two...?

But yes, things have been a bit tumultuous. I hope the
powers that be have some kind of plan...

To think the Titans could appear so close to town... What
is Lord Merukimon doing?

I've heard of Titan activity elsewhere, too... Does this
mean we need to see to our own defense?
We... are... Raremon... We... eat... trash...
We... eat... we... get grow... And... make town... better...
We grow... and get big...

When I was a Rookie, I purposely took on guys who were a
step above me in strength.

That's why I was able climb my way to the top and become a
Mega, see?
Maybe that kind of drive is what you all are missing.

Okay, now I want each of you to tell us your greatest weakness.
You got that?!

What're those things floatin' all over town...? The way they
drift over and stare creeps me out...

Hey, you there! I haven't seen you around these parts! You
must be new here! Am I right, brother?

Wa-haha! What, all the shady freaks around here got
you nervous?!
